author: Reggie86
description: Relevance-scored full-text vault search with PARA filtering, folder scoping, phrase and AND operators. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Reggie86
manifest.description: Retro-styled, relevance-scored full-text vault search. PARA sidebar filter, FolderName:search syntax, highlighted snippets, tag browsing, and I'm Feeling Lucky.
manifest.name: VaultDex

name: VaultDex

releases.author: Reggie86
releases.description:
### Changed
- Default max results raised from 25 to 50
- Setting max results to **0** now means no limit — returns all matching results. Useful for folder-scoped searches where you want to see everything.
releases.name: v1.2.18 — Default 50 results, 0 = no limit

releases.author: Reggie86
releases.description: Updated manifest description to better reflect current feature set.
releases.name: v1.2.16 — Updated plugin description

releases.author: Reggie86
releases.description:
### New
- **New folder search syntax: `FolderName:search terms`** — more intuitive than the old `folder:Name search` syntax. Works like `site:` in Google.
  - `Snippets:music` — search Snippets folder for music
  - `Electronic:ambient` — search Electronic Music folder for ambient
  - `Resources:linux` — search Resources for linux
  - Partial folder name matching — `Electronic` matches `Electronic Music`
  - Legacy `folder:Name search` syntax still works

### Fixed
- **Filenames are now searchable** — notes where the frontmatter title differs from the filename (e.g. a Snippet titled "Andriven" but filed as `Music_2025-06-27.md`) are now findable by filename.
releases.name: v1.2.15 — New FolderName:search syntax

releases.author: Reggie86
releases.description:
### Improved
- **`folder:` now supports partial folder name matching** — `folder:Electronic` matches `Electronic Music`, `folder:Personal` matches `Personal Notes`, etc. Previously required exact single-word names. Works like `site:` in web search engines.
releases.name: v1.2.13 — folder: supports partial folder names

releases.author: Reggie86
releases.description:
### Fixed
- All remaining portal scan warnings resolved
- `void` added to fire-and-forget promises (revealLeaf, setViewState, openFile, rebuildIndex)
- `loadData()` result properly typed as `Partial<VaultDexSettings>`
- `instanceof TFile` used instead of `as TFile` cast in openNote()
- Removed unnecessary `HTMLImageElement` type assertion
releases.name: v1.2.12 — Clean portal scan

releases.author: Reggie86
releases.description: Set minAppVersion to 1.7.2 — this is the exact version that introduced FileSystemAdapter.getResourcePath(), which VaultDex uses to load the logo image.
releases.name: v1.2.11 — correct minAppVersion 1.7.2

releases.author: Reggie86
releases.description: Bumped minAppVersion to 1.7.0 to match getResourcePath and manifest.dir API requirements.
releases.name: v1.2.10 — minAppVersion 1.7.0

releases.author: Reggie86
releases.description:
### Fixed
- Bumped `minAppVersion` to `1.6.0` to match `manifest.dir` and `getResourcePath` API requirements
- Removed plugin name and word 'settings' from settings tab heading
releases.name: v1.2.9 — Portal scan compliance fixes

releases.author: Reggie86
releases.description:
### Fixed
- Passes Obsidian automated plugin scan — all portal errors resolved
- Replaced `innerHTML` with `sanitizeHTMLToDom()` for safe snippet rendering
- Replaced raw `h2` heading in settings with `Setting.setHeading()` API
- Removed inline style assignments; all colors handled via CSS
- Used `app.vault.configDir` instead of hardcoded `.obsidian`
- Bumped `minAppVersion` to `1.5.3` to match APIs in use
- Simplified command ID/name (Obsidian auto-prefixes plugin ID)
releases.name: v1.2.8 — Obsidian community portal compliance

releases.author: Reggie86
releases.description:
### Fixed
- **Clicking a moved or renamed note no longer silently fails.** If VaultDex's index has a stale path (e.g. you reorganized your vault after the last index build), it now falls back to locating the note by filename. If the note genuinely can't be found, a clear notice is shown prompting you to reload VaultDex. Previously the click just did nothing with no feedback.

### Added
- **Path tooltip on result titles.** Hovering over a result title now shows the full vault path — useful when multiple notes share a similar title.

### Changed
- **Results page now uses your theme's accent color.** All hardcoded purple has been replaced with Obsidian CSS variables. The header, divider rule, sidebar headings, result count, active sort button, and tag chips all now inherit your theme's accent color automatically.
releases.name: v1.2.7 — Stale path fix, path tooltip, theme-adaptive colors

releases.author: Reggie86
releases.description: Add versions.json (required by Obsidian community plugin portal)
releases.name: VaultDex 1.2.6

releases.author: Reggie86
releases.description: Fix remaining CSS lint warning: replace !important on .vd-sort-btn.active with higher specificity selector (.vaultdex-view .vd-sort-btn.active)
releases.name: VaultDex 1.2.5

releases.author: Reggie86
releases.description:
Fix two Obsidian community scan warnings:
- Replace builtin-modules npm package with Node built-in `{ builtinModules } from "module"`
- Remove CSS `!important` from .vd-sidebar-h3 (inline JS in renderSidebar() handles the colors correctly)
releases.name: VaultDex 1.2.4

releases.author: Reggie86
releases.description:
Initial public release of VaultDex — a retro-styled full-text search plugin for Obsidian.

- Relevance-scored full-text search across your vault
- PARA category sidebar with click-to-filter
- Clickable tags for tag browsing
- Sort by Relevance or Newest
- I'm Feeling Lucky — opens a random note
- Folder-scoped search: folder:<name> "query"
- Phrase and AND search syntax
- Theme-adaptive — works with any Obsidian community theme
releases.name: VaultDex 1.2.3
